_comment: EDIT THIS FILE with the areas you want the daily GitHub Action to watch. You can edit it right in the GitHub web editor (pencil icon) — no coding needed. Each entry: 'area' (required), 'city' (default Dubai), 'property_type' (apartment/studio/villa/townhouse), 'bedrooms' (1/2/3 or omit for any), 'portal' (bayut/propertyfinder/dubizzle).
